rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.064, which governs regional education service center school safety support duties. No textual or operational conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 8.064. SCHOOL SAFETY SUPPORT. (a) A regional education service center shall act as a school safety resource
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text concerns school safety support and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
